title: BdoubleO Smooth Water Texture
description: Smooth water texture just like BdoubleO
body:
I made a resourcepack that adds the smooth water seen on [BdoubleO's](https://www.youtube.com/@bdoubleo) Hermitcraft videos

In game example
![A Minecraft River with the smooth water resourcepack applied](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1f0acf357adfc7d89a2ca994bcff582deb63928.jpeg)
Who is this guy?
![Image of minecraft river with a player up close facing the camera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/787910877d95d9d5e9b11e87df5baa7fc373aef1_0.webp)
